name: design-review
description: Design Review — pipeline de VITALIDAD de diseño (cura el 'plano y sin vida'). Agentes + comando /design-review:run + hook. Instálala suelta o desde el hub claude-code-setup-optimizer.

plugins.name: design-review
plugins.description: Orchestrator of design skills: preflight (declare+ask+install) → reference-research → 4 core skills routed → vitality verdict (alive/templated/flat) → loop. Agents + command + gate hook.
